Defines structures for time and timezones, custom assert macros, and standard C library headers.

## Folders
- **[sys](sys/README.md)**: Defines structures for time values and timezones, and declares the `gettimeofday` function.

## Files
- **[assert.h](assert.h.md)**: Defines a custom assert macro for error checking and debugging in C/C++ programs.
- **[setjmp.h](setjmp.h.md)**: Header file for nonlocal goto functionality using `setjmp` and `longjmp` with architecture-specific context storage.
- **[stdio.h](stdio.h.md)**: Header file for standard I/O operations, defining file descriptors and functions like printf and fopen.
- **[stdlib.h](stdlib.h.md)**: Header file for standard library functions including exit, abort, rand, and srand.
- **[string.h](string.h.md)**: String manipulation functions for memory and string operations in C.
